creator: bsdpr@phoe.frmug.org
text:
When libshout is not installed and when mixxx's port SHOUTCAST option is disabled, mixxx fails to configure itself.

How-To-Repeat: $ make showconfig
===> The following configuration options are available for mixxx-1.11.0_2:
     DOCS=off: Build and/or install documentation
     FAAD=off: FAAD AAC decoder support
     LAME=off: LAME MP3 audio encoder support
     SHOUTCAST=off: Ogg Icecast and SHOUTcast support
     TCMALLOC=on: Use Google's TCMalloc
     WAVPACK=off: WavPack lossless audio format support
===> Use 'make config' to modify these settings
$ make
